cleavage agent: overnight digestion with Trypsin/LysC (Promega, Madison, WI)
instrument: analyzed by LC/MS/MS on a QExactive_Plus mass spectrometer (ThermoFisher)
labeling: mass spectrometry data have been uploaded to the ProteomeXchange Consortium
reduction reagent: quenched by 1:50 (v/v) 100 mM DTT before aliquoting and storage
